Tests for framebuffer operations, bit block transfers, graphics blending, drawing functions, GBitmap handling, and graphics context in the Pebble firmware, with additional utilities and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[1bit](1bit/README.md)**: Tests for framebuffer operations, including reading, writing, and comparing framebuffer images.
- **[8bit](8bit/README.md)**: Tests for framebuffer operations, including reading, writing, and comparing framebuffer images.

## Files
- **[graphics_common_stubs.h](graphics_common_stubs.h.md)**: Header file including stub declarations for various graphics-related components in testing.
- **[test_bitblt.c](test_bitblt.c.md)**: Tests for bit block transfer (bitblt) operations in various scenarios, including compositing, clipping, and wrapping.
- **[test_bitblt_circular.c](test_bitblt_circular.c.md)**: Tests for bitblt operations on circular display buffers with various color depths and tiling support.
- **[test_bitblt_palette.c](test_bitblt_palette.c.md)**: Tests for bit block transfer (bitblt) operations with various color depths and compositing modes.
- **[test_bitblt_palette_1bit.c](test_bitblt_palette_1bit.c.md)**: Tests for 1-bit and 2-bit palette bitblt operations in the Pebble firmware graphics module.
- **[test_blending.template.c](test_blending.template.c.md)**: Tests for graphics blending functionality in different alpha channel scenarios.
- **[test_framebuffer.template.c](test_framebuffer.template.c.md)**: Tests framebuffer clearing functionality for different screen color depths in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_framebuffer_clipping.c](test_framebuffer_clipping.c.md)**: Tests for framebuffer clipping functionality in the Pebble firmware graphics module.
- **[test_framebuffer_duma.c](test_framebuffer_duma.c.md)**: Tests for framebuffer drawing operations, including boundary checks and color display validation.
- **[test_gbitmap_data_row_info.c](test_gbitmap_data_row_info.c.md)**: Tests for GBitmap data row information retrieval in rectangular and circular formats.
- **[test_gbitmap_formats.c](test_gbitmap_formats.c.md)**: Tests for creating and validating GBitmap formats across different platforms in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_gbitmap_processor.c](test_gbitmap_processor.c.md)**: Tests for the GBitmap processor in the Pebble firmware, including pre and post function handling.
- **[test_gbitmap_resource_validation.c](test_gbitmap_resource_validation.c.md)**: Tests for validating GBitmap resource initialization and size calculations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_gbitmap_sequence.c](test_gbitmap_sequence.c.md)**: Tests for GBitmap sequence functionality, including frame updates, color depth handling, and looping behavior.
- **[test_gdraw_command.c](test_gdraw_command.c.md)**: Tests for the `gdraw_command` graphics functions in the Pebble firmware, including drawing and validating commands and images.
- **[test_gdraw_command_resources.c](test_gdraw_command_resources.c.md)**: Tests for loading and validating GDrawCommand resources in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_gdraw_command_sequence.c](test_gdraw_command_sequence.c.md)**: Tests for the `gdraw_command_sequence` functionality in the Pebble firmware, including validation, frame retrieval, and cloning.
- **[test_gdraw_command_transforms.c](test_gdraw_command_transforms.c.md)**: Tests for gdraw command transforms in the Pebble firmware, including scaling and animation functions.
- **[test_graphics.h](test_graphics.h.md)**: Header file for testing graphics context initialization and reset in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_graphics_blending.c](test_graphics_blending.c.md)**: Tests for graphics blending functions, focusing on color opacity and alpha channel handling.
- **[test_graphics_circle.c](test_graphics_circle.c.md)**: Tests for graphics circle functions, including polar coordinate calculations and drawing operations.
- **[test_graphics_colors.c](test_graphics_colors.c.md)**: Tests for color manipulation functions in the Pebble firmware, including color equality, inversion, grayscale, and tinting.
- **[test_graphics_context.template.c](test_graphics_context.template.c.md)**: Tests for graphics context functions, including drawing and filling shapes with various stroke widths and antialiasing options.
- **[test_graphics_context_mask.c](test_graphics_context_mask.c.md)**: Tests for graphics context mask functionality, including setup, recording, applying, and basic operations.
- **[test_graphics_draw_bitmap.c](test_graphics_draw_bitmap.c.md)**: Tests for drawing bitmap graphics in various scenarios and compositing modes in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_graphics_draw_circle.template.c](test_graphics_draw_circle.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing circles and arcs with various configurations, including antialiasing, stroke width, and color settings.
- **[test_graphics_draw_core.c](test_graphics_draw_core.c.md)**: Tests for core graphics drawing functions, including horizontal and vertical line patterns, pixel drawing, and column replication.
- **[test_graphics_draw_implementation.c](test_graphics_draw_implementation.c.md)**: Tests for graphics drawing functions using fake implementations to verify function call counts.
- **[test_graphics_draw_line.c](test_graphics_draw_line.c.md)**: Tests for drawing lines in various styles and configurations on a framebuffer, including dotted and clipped lines.
- **[test_graphics_draw_pixel.template.c](test_graphics_draw_pixel.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing pixels in various scenarios, including clipping, transparency, and different layer positions.
- **[test_graphics_draw_rect.template.c](test_graphics_draw_rect.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing rectangles with various configurations, including color, clipping, and anti-aliasing.
- **[test_graphics_draw_rotated_bitmap.c](test_graphics_draw_rotated_bitmap.c.md)**: Tests for drawing rotated bitmaps in different configurations and color depths.
- **[test_graphics_draw_round_rect.template.c](test_graphics_draw_round_rect.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing rounded rectangles in various configurations and conditions using a graphics library.
- **[test_graphics_draw_stroke.template.c](test_graphics_draw_stroke.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing strokes in various conditions using the Pebble firmware graphics library.
- **[test_graphics_draw_stroke_precise.template.c](test_graphics_draw_stroke_precise.template.c.md)**: Tests for precise stroke drawing in graphics, including anti-aliased and non-anti-aliased scenarios.
- **[test_graphics_draw_text.template.c](test_graphics_draw_text.template.c.md)**: Tests for text drawing and clipping functionality in a graphics context, including ellipsis and word wrap modes.
- **[test_graphics_draw_text_flow.c](test_graphics_draw_text_flow.c.md)**: Tests for text flow rendering in the Pebble firmware graphics module, including handling of text layout, paging, and orphan prevention.
- **[test_graphics_fill_circle.template.c](test_graphics_fill_circle.template.c.md)**: Tests for the graphics fill circle functionality in various scenarios, including antialiasing and color handling.
- **[test_graphics_fill_rect.template.c](test_graphics_fill_rect.template.c.md)**: Tests for the `graphics_fill_rect` function with various configurations and clipping scenarios.
- **[test_graphics_gpath.template.c](test_graphics_gpath.template.c.md)**: Tests for graphics path rendering, including filled, clipped, and anti-aliased paths in various scenarios.
- **[test_graphics_gtransform.template.c](test_graphics_gtransform.template.c.md)**: Tests for graphics transformation functions, including matrix operations and transformations like scale, translation, and rotation.
- **[test_graphics_mask.h](test_graphics_mask.h.md)**: Tests for graphics mask operations in the Pebble firmware, including value retrieval and debugging.
- **[test_graphics_stroke_circle.template.c](test_graphics_stroke_circle.template.c.md)**: Tests for drawing stroked circles with various radii and clipping conditions in different quadrants.
- **[test_graphics_text_node.c](test_graphics_text_node.c.md)**: Unit tests for the graphics text node functionality in the Pebble firmware, including text drawing and size calculations.
- **[test_graphics_window_stack_animation.c](test_graphics_window_stack_animation.c.md)**: Tests for window stack animation transitions in the Pebble firmware graphics module.
- **[test_gtypes.c](test_gtypes.c.md)**: Tests for graphics types and functions in the Pebble firmware, including scaling and insets.
- **[test_palettized_conversion.c](test_palettized_conversion.c.md)**: Tests for palettized image conversion and byte reversal in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_pbi.c](test_pbi.c.md)**: Tests for loading palettized PBI files into GBitmap, covering various bit depths and transparency.
- **[test_pdc.c](test_pdc.c.md)**: Tests the function `draw_pdc_image` using stubs and assertions for PDC image handling.
- **[test_perimeter.c](test_perimeter.c.md)**: Tests for perimeter calculations in circular and rectangular displays using various geometric functions.
- **[test_png.c](test_png.c.md)**: Tests for loading various PNG formats into gbitmap, including checks for color depth and transparency.
- **[util.h](util.h.md)**: Header file for testing graphics utilities, including functions for handling GBitmap objects, file operations, and test context setup.
- **[util_pbi.h](util_pbi.h.md)**: Function to write a GBitmap to a PBI file and convert it to PNG using a Python script.
- **[weather_app_resources.c](weather_app_resources.c.md)**: Functions to create graphical resources for weather app icons, including cloud and sun images.
- **[weather_app_resources.h](weather_app_resources.h.md)**: Functions to create weather-related graphics resources for clouds and sun in different sizes.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for generating and running graphics tests on different platforms with varying bit depths.
